The query asks for the capital city of the country that won the 2010 World Cup.

Additional Considerations:
- Ensure the information is current and verified from reliable sources.
- Use multiple tools if necessary to cross-verify the information.
- Understand that the query requires both factual knowledge and the ability to find that knowledge efficiently.
</answer>

Spain won the 2010 FIFA World Cup, defeating the Netherlands 1-0 in the final[1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2010_FIFA_World_Cup), [2](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/articles/world-cup-champions-1982-2022-italy-argentina-germany-brazil-france-spain), [3](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2010_FIFA_World_Cup_final), [4](https://www.plus.fifa.com/en/showcase/gloria-at-the-2010-fifa-world-cup-south-africatm/336e78fb-4309-4b7a-a8f2-1dc99ef00303?gl=us), [5](https://www.si.com/soccer/spain-2010-world-cup-winners-where-are-they-now). Action Step 1.sub_goal: Find the winner of the 2010 World Cup and the capital city of that country.
Action Step 1.command: execution = tool.execute(query="What's the capital city of the country that was the champion of the 2010 World Cup?")
result: The capital city of the country that was the champion of the 2010 FIFA World Cup is Madrid. Spain won the 2010 FIFA World Cup, defeating the Netherlands 1-0 in the final[1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2010_FIFA_World_Cup), [2](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/articles/world-cup-champions-1982-2022-italy-argentina-germany-brazil-france-spain), [3](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2010_FIFA_World_Cup_final), [4](https://www.plus.fifa.com/en/showcase/gloria-at-the-2010-fifa-world-cup-south-africatm/336e78fb-4309-4b7a-a8f2-1dc99ef00303?gl=us), [5](https://www.si.com/soccer/spain-2010-world-cup-winners-where-are-they-now). Madrid is the capital and most populous city of Spain[6](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Madrid), [7](https://www.britannica.com/place/Madrid), [8](https://www.gostudyspain.es/About-Madrid.htm), [9](https://www.ebsco.com/research-starters/geography-and-cartography/madrid-spain), [10](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spain).
